title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE SUB-DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CARMONA, PROVINCE OF CAVITE INTO A REGULAR DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
115 OG No. 35, 9598 (September 2, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11351, July 25, 2019 ]

AN ACT UPGRADING THE SUB-DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CARMONA, PROVINCE OF CAVITE INTO A REGULAR DISTRICT ENGINEERING OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION

1. The sub-district engineering office located in the Municipality of Carmona, Province of Cavite, is hereby upgraded into a regular district engineering office to be known as the Cavite Third District Engineering Office.

SEC. 2. The district engineering office shall serve the municipalities of Carmona, Silang and General Mariano Alvarez of the Fifth Legislative District of the Province of Cavite and the cities of Bacoor and Dasmari√±as of the Second and Fourth Legislative Districts of the Province of Cavite, respectively.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Public Works and Highways shall include in the Department's program the operationalization of the Cavite Third District Engineering Office in the Province of Cavite, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on May 15, 2017 and May 20, 2019, respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: JUL 25 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
